header.title: Customer Testimonials
header.subtitle: Discover why thousands of residents in Islamabad trust CITY SAHULAT SERVICES for their home needs.

items.name: Ahmed Khan
items.comment: The home cleaning service was impeccable. The team arrived on time and used professional equipment. Our house in Islamabad has never looked better. Truly a 5-star experience!

items.name: Sarah Malik
items.comment: Excellent TV mounting service. The technician was knowledgeable and ensured all cables were neatly hidden. He was a few minutes late, but the quality of work more than made up for it.

items.name: Zubair Ahmed
items.comment: Emergency plumbing handled perfectly. Had a major leak at 10 PM and they responded within 30 minutes. Fixed everything without any fuss. Extremely reliable service.

items.name: Ayesha Siddiqui
items.comment: Had our complete wiring checked and several outlets replaced. The electrician was professional, safe, and explained everything clearly. Great value and peace of mind.

items.name: Omer Farooq
items.comment: Best AC service in Islamabad. They did a deep chemical wash and my unit is cooling better than when it was new. Very satisfied with the pricing too.

items.name: Mariam Khan
items.comment: Professional furniture assembly. They put together my entire home office setup in just 2 hours. Saved me days of work and frustration!
